creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please, remove https://pkg.freebsd.org/ from everywhere you added it.  While it works, it is an artifact that should not be (ab)used.

Also, remove https://distfiles.macports.org/* (and https://ftp.mirrorservice.org/sites/distfiles.macports.org/*), https://download.freenas.org/distfiles, they are caches, not authoritative sources.

I am also not sure about https://download.snake.de/dist, it seems like some sort of cache.
